interLocalization.cpp
Go to the documentation of this file.
1 #include "swarmus_ros_simulation/interLocalization.h"
2 
3 /*
4 Class function implementations
5 */
6 InterLocalization::InterLocalization() {
7  m_robotName = Simulation::getParamRobotName();
8  m_interlocPub = m_nodeHandle.advertise<swarmus_ros_simulation::InterLocalization_grid>(
9  "interlocalization_grid", 1000);
10  m_polygonPub = m_nodeHandle.advertise<geometry_msgs::PolygonStamped>("PolygonStamped", 1000);
11 
12  ROS_INFO("HiveMind initialization of: %s", m_robotName.c_str());
13 }
14 
15 float InterLocalization::getDistanceFrom(float x, float y) { return sqrt(pow(x, 2) + pow(y, 2)); }
16 
17 float InterLocalization::getAnglefrom(float x, float y) { return atan2(y, x) * 180.0 / M_PI; }
18 
19 void InterLocalization::publish(swarmus_ros_simulation::InterLocalization_grid grid) {
20  m_interlocPub.publish(grid);
21  m_polygonPub.publish(generatePolyMsg(grid));
22 }
23 
24 std::string InterLocalization::getRobotName() { return m_robotName; }
25 geometry_msgs::PolygonStamped InterLocalization::generatePolyMsg(
26  swarmus_ros_simulation::InterLocalization_grid grid) {
27  geometry_msgs::Polygon poly;
28  poly.points.reserve(2 * grid.otherRobotsListSize + 1);
29  geometry_msgs::Point32 point;
30  point.x = 0.0;
31  point.y = 0.0;
32  point.z = 0.0;
33  poly.points.push_back(point);
34 
35  for (int i = 0; i < grid.otherRobotsListSize; i++) {
36  swarmus_ros_simulation::InterLocalization interLocalization = grid.otherRobots[i];
37  Simulation::Angle angle(interLocalization.angle, false);
38  point.x = interLocalization.distance * cos(angle.inRadians);
39  point.y = interLocalization.distance * sin(angle.inRadians);
40  poly.points.push_back(point);
41 
42  // Add a point in polygon to return to hiveboard
43  point.x = 0.0;
44  point.y = 0.0;
45  point.z = 0.0;
46  poly.points.push_back(point);
47  }
48 
49  geometry_msgs::PolygonStamped msg;
50  msg.polygon = poly;
51  msg.header.stamp = ros::Time::now();
52  msg.header.frame_id = m_robotName + "/hiveboard";
53  return msg;
54 }
55 
56 /*
57 ROS main
58 */
59 int main(int argc, char** argv) {
60  ros::init(argc, argv, "InterLocalization");
61 
62  InterLocalization interloc;
63 
64  std::string reference = interloc.getRobotName() + gs_hiveBoardLink;
65  swarmus_ros_simulation::InterLocalization_grid grid;
66  grid.source_robot = reference;
67 
68  tf::TransformListener listener;
69 
70  ros::Rate loop_rate(10); // Probablement qu'on pourrait changer la boucle pour des evenements
71  // declenches par le board.
72 
73  while (ros::ok()) {
74  int count = 0;
75  for (std::string& m_robotName : Simulation::getRobotList()) {
76  if (m_robotName == interloc.getRobotName()) {
77  continue;
78  }
79 
80  std::string target = m_robotName + gs_hiveBoardLink;
81 
82  tf::StampedTransform transform;
83  try {
84  listener.lookupTransform(reference, target, ros::Time(0), transform);
85  } catch (tf::TransformException ex) {
86  ROS_ERROR("%s", ex.what());
87  ros::Duration(1.0).sleep();
88  }
89 
90  swarmus_ros_simulation::InterLocalization interlocMessage;
91  interlocMessage.target_robot = target;
92  interlocMessage.distance =
93  interloc.getDistanceFrom(transform.getOrigin().x(), transform.getOrigin().y());
94  interlocMessage.angle =
95  interloc.getAnglefrom(transform.getOrigin().x(), transform.getOrigin().y());
96  Simulation::Angle rotation(transform.getRotation().getAngle(), true);
97  interlocMessage.rotation = rotation.inDegrees;
98  grid.otherRobots.push_back(interlocMessage);
99  count++;
100  }
101 
102  grid.otherRobotsListSize = count;
103  interloc.publish(grid);
104  grid.otherRobots.clear();
105 
106  ros::spinOnce();
107  loop_rate.sleep();
108  }
109  return 0;
110 }

std::string m_robotName
